name: continuity_window_summary
primary_question: What bounded self-agency continuity posture is represented by the committed cross-owner reference chain without turning stats into continuity truth or self-agency proof?
derivation_rule: derive one committed reference snapshot from an aoa-agents continuity-window example, the experimental aoa-playbooks continuity cycle, an aoa-memo provenance-thread example, and draft continuity anchors in the aoa-evals catalog
authority_ceiling: Weaker than an owner-runtime continuity artifact or receipt, resolvable anchor evidence, reviewed memo writeback, activated playbook verdict, and real eval reports.
